title: rosa canina var. dumetorum
intro: Rosa canina var. dumetorum is a variety of the dog rose plant, a species of rose native to Europe and Western Asia. It is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its hips, which are a rich source of vitamins A and C, as well as other essential nutrients. The hips of Rosa canina var. dumetorum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits, including boosting the immune system and supporting cardiovascular health.
